content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Road To Zero". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1342/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains two integers a and b on a new line.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make both a and b zero.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Count the number of bits set in the binary representation of a and b, then add them together.
